ground_truth.title: North America Tours & Packages - 2026 & 2027 | Grand European Travel
ground_truth.main_content:
Embark on a journey of a lifetime and experience the best of Canada and the US. Our 7-15 day North America tours are tailored to cater to every adventurer, with scenic national parks, cosmopolitan cities, famous museums, and more. Uncover the richness of North America with every step of your journey. Book today!

North America Tours by Region
Our North America travel packages are your ticket to explore the diverse wonders of this beautiful continent. Whether you're looking for a North America tour filled with natural beauty or cityscape excitement, we've got you covered. Book a tour to North America and experience the best of the USA and Canada with expert Travel Directors by your side. From the bustling cities of New York, Los Angeles and San Francisco to the serene landscapes of Banff National Park and Niagara Falls, you'll discover the most iconic destinations of North America. Our local guides take you through the streets of their hometowns, revealing hidden gems and local secrets that you wouldn't find on your own. Don't miss out on this unforgettable experience - book your North America tour today!

USA National Parks Tours
Check out our collection of US National Park tour packages if you want to tour one of the top USA National Parks. You can visit Yellowstone National Park, Bryce Canyon National Park, Zion National Park, Arches National Park, Yosemite National Park, Canyonlands National Park, Denali National Park, Sequoia National Park, the Badlands, Mesa Verde National Park, Mount Rushmore, the Crazy Horse Memorial, the Black Hills, or Monument Valley, often checking off more than one or two parks in one trip!

Western and Northwestern United States
California: Discover the lively cities of San Francisco and Los Angeles. Trace the path of celebrities along the renowned Walk of Fame and take in the sparkle and splendor of Hollywood. Experience the wonders of must-see attractions like Yosemite National Park, the Grand Canyon, and the Napa and Sonoma wine regions.
Pacific Northwest: Discover the natural beauty of Oregon and Washington on a tour through the stunning landscapes of the Pacific Coast, Cascade Mountains, and Seattle.
Alaska: Explore the untamed wilderness of Alaska's Denali National Park, take a glacier cruise, and watch for whales, brown coastal bears, and wolves on a wildlife adventure. Check out our collection of 7-10 day Alaska tours and explore the majesty of this unique destination.
Hawaii: Explore the beauty of Hawaii on a tour with visits to the top attractions, including the iconic Pearl Harbor and USS Arizona Memorial in Honolulu, the volcanic wonders of Hawaii Volcanoes National Park, and the pristine beaches of Maui, offering an unforgettable island experience. If you’re looking for a tour of the Hawaiian Islands, check out our collection of 7-15 day Hawaii tours and packages and book a tropical escape!

Southwestern United States
Arizona: Experience the Sonoran Desert's unique landscapes, including Sedona's red rocks and the cultural richness of Tucson and Phoenix.
New Mexico: Explore Santa Fe's art scene, visit historic Taos Pueblo, and admire the dramatic landscapes of the state's desert and mountains.

Rocky Mountains and Western Canada
Montana: Visit Montana to experience its breathtaking natural beauty, from the rugged Rocky Mountains to its pristine lakes. Montana boasts an array of top sites that showcase its stunning landscapes and rich heritage, including Glacier National Park with its pristine wilderness, Yellowstone National Park's geothermal wonders, the historic mining town of Butte, and the cultural hub of Missoula nestled amidst picturesque mountains.
Colorado: Enjoy outdoor adventures such as skiing in Aspen, hiking in Rocky Mountain National Park, and exploring the vibrant city of Denver.
Canadian Rockies: The Canadian Rockies, with their towering peaks and serene lakes, await your discovery. Dive into the heart of nature at Banff National Park and soak in the tranquility of this UNESCO World Heritage site, Jasper National Park, and the iconic Lake Louise. Check out our collection of tours to Canada to see more.

Eastern North America
East Coast US States, New England: Travel to the East Coast of the USA and Canada to tour iconic cities, states, and provinces. Experience the charm of New England's coastal towns, fall foliage, and historic sites on tours that visit states like Massachusetts, Vermont, and Maine. Experience the vibrant pulse of New York with our guided tours, featuring iconic landmarks like Times Square, Central Park, and the Statue of Liberty, alongside insider insights into the city's rich cultural tapestry. Discover the historical treasures of Philadelphia on a guided tour, exploring iconic landmarks such as Independence Hall, the Liberty Bell, and the Philadelphia Museum of Art while immersing yourself in the city's rich cultural and revolutionary heritage.
Eastern Canada: Discover the hidden treasures of Eastern Canada, where history, art, and culture come together in perfect harmony. Travelers who want to explore the best of Eastern Canada most often visit the vibrant atmosphere of Quebec City, the oldest walled city in North America, and Montreal, the cultural capital of the province. Explore the Canadian Shield's rugged beauty, the Laurentian Mountains' stunning landscapes and the charming coastal towns of Nova Scotia and Prince Edward Island. Eastern Canada is a world of endless possibilities waiting to be discovered.
Toronto and Ontario: Explore the cosmopolitan city of Toronto and the stunning landscapes of Ontario, including Niagara Falls, where you can witness the roaring power of this natural wonder and create lasting memories.
Canadian Maritime Provinces: Explore the historic charm of Halifax and Nova Scotia, visit the iconic Peggy's Cove, discover the idyllic landscapes of Prince Edward Island, and immerse yourself in the vibrant cultural scene of St. John's, Newfoundland, creating memories in the heart of Canada's Atlantic coastline.

Southern United States
Louisiana: Discover the unique culture, music, and cuisine of New Orleans, as well as the antebellum charm of plantation tours along the Mississippi River. Immerse yourself in the vibrant culture of the Big Easy with its iconic French Quarter, jazz music, and delicious Creole cuisine.
Tennessee: Experience the heart of country music in Nashville and visit famous attractions like the Grand Ole Opry and the Country Music Hall of Fame. Visit Graceland in Memphis to explore the iconic mansion, Elvis Presley's personal belongings, and various exhibits related to his music and legacy.
Mississippi: Explore the birthplace of blues music and visit historic sites like Clarksdale and the Highway 61 Blues Museum.

Frequently Asked Questions About North America Guided Tours
What destinations can I visit? 
North America offers a wide range of destinations, including major cities like New York, San Francisco, and Toronto, as well as natural wonders such as the Grand Canyon, Yellowstone National Park, and the Canadian Rockies.
How long do the guided tours typically last?
Tour durations vary widely, ranging from six to 20 days, depending on the specific itinerary.
What is included in a North America guided tour package?
Inclusions vary by tour. All tours include transportation, accommodation, guided tours and activities, meals, and most admissions.
